title: Time Line
description: A component that displays a sequence of events or steps in chronological order, with support for custom icons, status indicators, and collapsible content.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using ax-time-line with ax-time-line-item

sections.title: With Icon
sections.description: Example of time line with custom icons in each item

sections.title: No Icon
sections.description: Example of time line with bullet points instead of icons

props.name: mode
props.description: Display mode of the time line items ('bullet' or 'icon')

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from AXComponent.

props.name: text
props.description: The text content displayed in the time line item header

props.name: isActive
props.description: Whether the time line item is in active state

props.name: isCollapsed
props.description: Whether the time line item content is collapsed

events.name: isCollapsedChange
events.description: Emits an event when the collapsed state changes as part of two-way binding for the model().

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from AXComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Handles the click event on the time line item header to toggle collapsed state.
 */
handleClick(): void
